items.title: Today, a solo mission talking about the final internal (possible) Pacers free agent in Quenton Jackson. What should the Pacers do with his partial guarantee? Seems simple, to me...
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Today, a solo mission talking about the final internal (possible) Pacers free agent in Quenton Jackson. What should the Pacers do with his partial guarantee? Seems simple, to me...
